description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway design, featuring a vibrant red finish on the body and neck. The front face displays a white pickguard, three control knobs, and a visible whammy bar, along with a set of pickups and a bridge typical of Stratocaster-style guitars. The neck is long and slender, with a light-colored fretboard and six tuning pegs arranged in a single row on the headstock. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, showcasing the red finish without any visible electronics or covers. The side views reveal the instrument's slim profile and the protruding whammy bar. This guitar is designed for performance and is commonly seen in urban environments such as music venues, street performances, and studios.
description: A red, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three control knobs, and a whammy bar, featuring a sleek, classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red body, white pickguard, pickups, control knobs, and whammy bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile and the protruding whammy bar.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted red finish of the guitar body and neck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin edge of the guitar and the whammy bar from a different angle.
attribute_headstock_design: Flat headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic contoured shape
